author: Design Team
longDescription: GameMaster shall be able to create a new game session before the party starts
acceptanceCriterion: New game session can be created and saved

author: Design Team
longDescription: GameMaster shall be able to enter and edit a list of participating players using a desktop-optimized interface
acceptanceCriterion: Player names can be added, edited, and removed

author: Design Team
longDescription: GameMaster shall be able to enter and edit a list of possible target words
comments: Support bulk paste | Changelog: Initial requirement

author: Design Team
longDescription: System shall generate a circular player assignment graph with random target words
acceptanceCriterion: Every player receives exactly one target and one pursuer
comments: No self-targeting allowed | Changelog: Initial requirement

author: Design Team
longDescription: System shall prevent a player from being assigned to themselves

author: Design Team
longDescription: Players shall be able to join a game lobby from their mobile device

author: Design Team
longDescription: System shall generate a unique 4-character alphanumeric lobby code for each joining player

author: Design Team
longDescription: GameMaster shall be able to see all unassigned lobby participants on mobile
comments: Real-time sync required | Changelog: Initial requirement

author: Design Team
longDescription: GameMaster shall be able to connect a player identity to a lobby code
comments: Manual verification flow | Changelog: Initial requirement

author: Design Team
longDescription: Player shall see their assigned target player after assignment
comments: Hide from screenshots later | Changelog: Initial requirement

author: Design Team
longDescription: Player shall see their assigned target word after assignment

author: Design Team
longDescription: Killer shall be able to register a kill by entering the victim’s badge code
comments: Anti-cheat validation needed | Changelog: Initial requirement

author: Design Team
longDescription: System shall remove killed players from the circular target graph
acceptanceCriterion: Dead player no longer appears as active

author: Design Team
longDescription: Killer shall inherit the target and target word of the killed player
comments: Atomic transaction required | Changelog: Initial requirement

author: Design Team
longDescription: Eliminated players shall see who killed them and which word triggered elimination
comments: Emotional UX important | Changelog: Initial requirement

author: Design Team
longDescription: Players shall be allowed to redraw their assigned word only once per game

author: Design Team
longDescription: System shall automatically end the game when only one active player remains
comments: Winner determination required | Changelog: Initial requirement

author: Design Team
longDescription: All participants shall see a leaderboard with kill counts after game end

author: Design Team
longDescription: GameMaster shall be able to remove players who cancelled participation
comments: Requires graph regeneration logic | Changelog: Initial requirement

author: Design Team
longDescription: GameMaster shall decide whether predecessor or successor word remains after removing a player
comments: Edge cases with 2 players | Changelog: Initial requirement

author: Design Team
longDescription: GameMaster shall be able to add late-arriving players during the lobby phase
comments: Only before game start | Changelog: Initial requirement

author: Design Team
shortDescription: Insert Late Player Before Unassigned Users
longDescription: System shall insert late players only before players without lobby association

author: Design Team
longDescription: GameMaster shall be able to manually change a player's target word
comments: Audit log needed | Changelog: Initial requirement

author: Design Team
longDescription: GameMaster shall be able to reassign a player identity to another lobby code

author: Design Team
longDescription: System shall synchronize gameplay state across all connected devices in real time

author: Design Team
longDescription: System shall persist game state to prevent data loss during disconnects

author: Design Team
longDescription: Players shall only see information relevant to their own mission

author: Design Team
longDescription: System shall validate that a kill badge belongs to the reported victim

author: Design Team
longDescription: Player-facing interfaces shall be optimized for mobile devices
acceptanceCriterion: Interface usable on standard smartphone sizes

author: Design Team
longDescription: GameMaster setup interface shall be optimized for desktop usage
